title: Get Into Gear, Stilton!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo must renew his driver's license and teams up with Solar, a talking robot car, to recover a stolen diamond necklace! 🚗

q.en: What yellow vehicle hit Geronimo as he crossed the street?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩过马路时被一辆什么黄色交通工具撞到了？

options.zh: 赫拉克勒·波瓦那辆香蕉形状的汽车

explain.en: Hercule says, 'I was driving the Bananamobile... It's an enormouse yellow car shaped like a banana.'
explain.zh: 赫拉克勒说：“我当时开着香蕉车……那是一辆香蕉形状的巨型黄色汽车。”

q.en: What precious item was stolen at the start of the story?
q.zh: 故事开头，哪件贵重物品被盗了？

options.zh: 凯瑟琳·罗登顿公爵夫人的七十三克拉钻石项链
杰罗尼摩的古老奶酪皮

explain.en: The newspaper headlines read that someone had 'STOLEN Duchess Catherine Rodenton's seventy-three-carat diamond necklace!'
explain.zh: 报纸头条报道：有人“偷走了凯瑟琳·罗登顿公爵夫人的七十三克拉钻石项链！”

q.en: Who is the owner of the driving school that teaches Geronimo?
q.zh: 谁是为杰罗尼摩授课的驾驶学校的老板？

options.zh: 市长弗雷德里克·弗兹爪

explain.en: It was 'Rusty Carr... the owner of the driving school' who gave Geronimo his lessons.
explain.zh: 驾驶学校的老板“拉斯提·卡尔”给杰罗尼摩上课。

q.en: What is the name of the first talking robot car in the world?
q.zh: 世界上第一辆会说话的机器人汽车叫什么名字？

explain.en: The car says, 'I AM SOLAR, A ROBOT CAR. YOU CAN CALL ME SOL.'
explain.zh: 那辆车说：“我是索拉，一辆机器人汽车。你可以叫我索尔。”

q.en: Who invented and built the robot car Solar?
q.zh: 是谁发明并制造了机器人汽车索拉？

explain.en: Geronimo recognizes 'PROFESSOR Paws von volt' and the professor says Solar is 'my latest INVENTION.'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩认出了“波·冯·沃尔特教授”，教授说索拉是他“最新的发明”。

q.en: What special power lets Solar become invisible?
q.zh: 索拉靠什么特殊能力让自己隐形？

options.zh: 一层强大的电磁屏蔽屏

explain.en: The book states, 'Thanks to a very powerful electromagnetic screen, it can become invisible.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“多亏一层非常强大的电磁屏蔽屏，它才能隐形。”

q.en: Who built the silver rival car named Lunar?
q.zh: 谁制造了那辆名叫露娜的银色对手汽车？

options.zh: 卡洛塔·卡尔，拉斯提的妹妹

explain.en: Rusty says, 'The silver car cannot disappear. That car is named Lunar. My sister, CARLOTTA, created it.'
explain.zh: 拉斯提说：“银色车不会消失，它叫露娜。我的妹妹卡洛塔制造了它。”

q.en: Whose brain was Solar's electronic brain modeled after?
q.zh: 索拉的电子大脑是以谁的大脑为原型制造的？

explain.en: Professor von Volt says, 'I tried to RECONSTRUCT the brain of the smartest and toughest rodent... your SISTER, Thea!'
explain.zh: 冯·沃尔特教授说：“我试图重现老鼠岛上最聪明、最厉害的老鼠——你的妹妹蒂拉——的大脑！”

q.en: What was Geronimo's secret mission with Solar?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和索拉的秘密任务是什么？

options.en: Find Lunar and return the stolen diamond necklace to the Mouseum
options.zh: 找到露娜，把被盗的钻石项链送回鼠物馆

explain.en: Margo tells him, 'Find Lunar, retrieve Duchess Catherine Rodenton's seventy-three-carat diamond necklace, and return it to New Mouse City's Mouseum.'
explain.zh: 玛戈告诉他：“找到露娜，取回凯瑟琳·罗登顿公爵夫人的七十三克拉钻石项链，送回老鼠岛的鼠物馆。”

q.en: How did Solar recover the diamond necklace from the sea?
q.zh: 索拉是怎样从海里取回钻石项链的？

options.en: With a long net extended from its door
options.zh: 用从车门伸出的长网兜捞起
和杰罗尼摩一起潜水去捡

options.en: By asking a fish to fetch it

explain.en: 'A long arm holding a net extended from the passenger-side door and scooped up the necklace before the sea could swallow it.'
explain.zh: “一条长臂从副驾驶门伸出，举着一个网兜，在大海吞掉项链之前把它捞了起来。”
